title: EAGLE FORCE vs THE SERPENT EMPIRE
note: 80s Saturday-morning cartoon TRAILER. Cel-shaded (flat shading hides warping). SHORT 1.5-2.5s cuts. RELIABLE motions ONLY: camera push/pan, jets/vehicles crossing frame, head turn, arm raise, laser bolts. NO complex locomotion. Lasers (blue=heroes, red=serpent) + explosions + title cards added in POST. Fast-cut to a synth theme. NO on-screen death. Reference-lock hero+villain for consistency.
style: 1980s Saturday-morning cartoon cel animation still, retro American action cartoon in the style of G.I. Joe and Robotech, bold thick clean ink outlines, flat cel shading, bright saturated colors, hand-painted background, subtle film grain, 1985
neg: blurry, warped, melting, deformed, distorted, morphing, extra limbs, photorealistic, 3d render, live action, blood, gore

shots.keyframe: STYLE. Extreme close-up of a glowing green serpent-eye emblem on dark metal, ominous, dramatic rim light, black background
shots.motion: slow menacing camera push-in on the glowing serpent emblem, faint light pulse, limited 1980s cartoon animation, stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. The Serpent Empire warlord on his throne, cobra-hooded helmet, glowing yellow eyes, green serpent banners behind, low dramatic angle
shots.motion: slow dramatic push-in on the warlord as he slowly turns his head toward the camera and his eyes flare, banners hold steady, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. A vast fleet of sleek green serpent-empire attack jets and hover-tanks advancing across a desert horizon at dusk, menacing armada, wide shot
shots.motion: the serpent armada advances, the camera slowly pans across the fleet, jets drifting forward, limited 1980s cartoon animation, stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. Heroic American commando in tan and green gear and red beret bursting into frame rappelling down a rope from a helicopter, dramatic low-angle action entrance, determined, dust and light behind him
shots.motion: the commando drops down the rope and lands in a crouch, then rises, a sharp confident action entrance, rope swinging, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. A team of four diverse heroic Eagle Force soldiers charging forward together toward the camera in a dynamic running action pose, weapons ready, determined, explosions and light behind them
shots.motion: the four Eagle Force soldiers charge forward toward the camera, arms and legs pumping, a dynamic heroic run, debris and light behind them, limited 1980s cartoon animation, energetic, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. The hero commando behind cover raising a bright blue energy laser rifle and taking aim, glowing blue muzzle, dramatic action angle
shots.motion: the commando snaps his blue laser rifle up to aim, sharp confident movement, bright blue muzzle glow, limited 1980s cartoon animation, clean and stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. Masked Serpent Empire troopers in green armor firing red energy lasers from behind rubble, dynamic battle, glowing red bolts
shots.motion: the serpent troopers fire red laser bolts, muzzle flashes, the camera holds steady with a slight shake, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. A sleek heroic blue-and-silver fighter jet banking hard across a sunset sky, dynamic angle, contrails, no cockpit visible
shots.motion: the fighter jet banks and streaks across the frame left to right, contrails trailing, camera pans to follow, limited 1980s cartoon animation, stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. The Serpent warlord standing on the command bridge of a massive serpent-empire warship, pointing forward at a glowing green tactical viewscreen, officers at consoles, dramatic villain pose, glowing eyes
shots.motion: the warlord thrusts his arm forward pointing at the viewscreen giving an order, cape swirling, glowing eyes flaring, consoles blinking, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. A heroic hover-tank rolling forward firing a bright blue energy cannon, dust kicking up, dynamic low angle, dramatic
shots.motion: the hover-tank rolls forward and fires its blue energy cannon, bright muzzle flash, dust rising, camera slight push, limited 1980s cartoon animation, stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. Epic wide battle, blue laser bolts and red laser bolts crossing in the air between heroic soldiers and serpent troopers, explosions of light, dramatic
shots.motion: an intense laser crossfire, blue and red bolts streaking both directions, bursts of light, camera holds with a slight shake, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. The hero commando leaping between two rooftops in a dramatic mid-air silhouette against an explosion of light, heroic, dynamic
shots.motion: the commando is frozen at the apex of a heroic leap, cape and flag streaming, a slow-motion feel, camera tracks slightly, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. Extreme close-up of the Serpent warlord's face, glowing yellow eyes and cruel sneer, dramatic villain close-up, green rim light
shots.motion: extreme slow push-in on the warlord's sneering face, his eyes flare brighter, limited 1980s cartoon animation, stable, no warping

shots.keyframe: STYLE. The hero commando standing tall and heroic, holding his glowing blue laser rifle across his chest, an enormous American flag rippling behind him, sunset, triumphant
shots.motion: a triumphant slow push-in on the hero, he lifts his chin proudly, the flag rippling grandly behind him, limited 1980s cartoon animation, no warping
